epic.title: Azure Cost Advisor (ACA) -- Phase 1 Commercial SaaS
epic.description: Azure Cost Advisor is a commercial SaaS product that helps Azure subscribers discover and act on cost-saving opportunities. 14 epics, 257 stories. Stack: FastAPI + React 19 + Fluent UI v9 + Cosmos DB + Azure Container Apps + APIM + Stripe.

features.title: Foundation and Infrastructure
features.description: Repo scaffold, Docker, CI, health endpoints, venv, environment wiring.

features.title: Data Collection and Authorization
features.description: MSAL auth modes A/B/C, Resource Graph, Cost Management, Advisor pull, pre-flight engine.

features.title: Analysis Engine and Rules
features.description: 12-rule heuristic engine, FindingsAssembler, 29-foundry analysis agents, redteam.

features.title: API -- FastAPI Routers and Middleware
features.description: FastAPI routers: auth, collect, reports, billing, entitlements, admin. APIM wiring.

features.title: Frontend Spark Architecture
features.description: Vite + React 19 + Fluent UI v9 + Spark. 5 customer screens + 5 admin screens.

features.title: Monetization and Billing
features.description: Stripe checkout, webhook lifecycle, entitlements grant/revoke/lock, APIM cache policy.

features.title: Delivery Packager
features.description: Jinja2 templates, ZIP packager, Blob SAS URLs, SHA-256 artifact verification.

features.title: Observability and Telemetry
features.description: Structured JSON logging, App Insights, TimingMiddleware, GA4, Clarity, consent.

features.title: i18n and a11y
features.description: i18next 5 locales (en, fr-CA, pt-BR, es, de), multi-currency, WCAG 2.1 AA, axe-core CI.

features.title: Commercial Hardening
features.description: APIM entitlement cache, rate limiting, idempotency, PIPEDA soft-delete, CSP headers.

features.title: Phase 2 Infrastructure
features.description: Terraform private landing zone, Lighthouse Mode C, BYO subscription wizard.

features.title: Data Model Support
features.description: ACA data model server (port 8055), WBS tracking, veritas-plan.json, seeder scripts.

features.title: Azure Best Practices Service Catalog
features.description: Azure best practices service catalog: 12 rule categories, IaC template library.

features.title: DPDCA Cloud Agent
features.description: DPDCA cloud agent: sprint manifest, evidence receipts, parse-agent-log, ADO feedback.
